titleStmt.title: SII 16.103: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 103. (A.R. No. 162 of 1905.) MĀRKĀPŪR, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall, left of entrance of the antarāḷamaṇḍapa of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1455, Vijaya, Chaitra śu. 15, corresponding to 1533 A.D., April 9.

Records a gift of the toll and other incomes from the two villages Yāchavaram, renamed as Achyutarāyapuram and Kuravipalle renamed as Koṇḍāpuram in Kochcherlakōṭa-sīma held as nāyaṅkara by the donor, Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Salakarāju Pina Tirumalayyadēvamahārāju, to god Chennakēśava.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī cennakēśavarāya . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya . śālivāhana . śakavarṣaṁbulu . 1455 Agunēṁṭi vijaya saṁvatsara . caitra śu 15 lu svastiśrī mārakāpura
śrīcennakēśavaperumāḷlaku . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara . Aṣṭadikkurāyamanōbhayaṁ kkara . yavanarājyasthāpanācārya . catussamu
drādhīśvara . śrīvīrapratāpa . Acyutadēvamahārāyalu . pṛthivisāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍḍaṁ gānu . śrīmanmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara . salakarāju pinatiru
malayyadēvamahārājuluṁgāru . śrī cennakēśavaperumāḷla śrīpādālaku daṁḍaṁ samarpiṁcci Iccina dharmmaśāsanaṁ śrī Accyutadēvamahā
rāyalu . māku nāyaṁkkarānaku . pāliṁppanavadhariṁcina . koccerlakōṭasīmalōni yāca varamaneḍi grāmānaku . Acyutarāyapuramaveḍi pra
tināmaṁ cēsinni . kuravipalle Anēṭi grāmānaku . koṁḍāpuramaneḍi pratināmaṁ cēsinni . yī reṁḍugrāmālunnu . śrī cennakēśavarāyala . tiruṇā
ḷamahōtsava . puṇyakālamaṁdu . śrīcennakēśavarāyala . Aṁgaraṁgavaibhavālakunnu . Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyaṁgānu . yī grāmālaṁ galigina . sakala suva
rna Ādāyaṁ . sakaladhānyādāyamunnu . suṁkhecūpuṭāyaṁ . Illari pullari . maggari . gānugari . kānike . khaḍḍāyaṁ . Iṁtavaṭṭunnu . lōnugānu . sahiraṇyō
daka dānadhārāpūrvakaṁgā ĀcaṁdrārkasthāIgā . samarpiṁstimi . I dharmānaku . yavvaru dappinānu . vāraṇāsilōnu . tama tallitaṁḍṟlānu . gōbrāhmalānu vadhiṁccina dōṣā
naṁ bovuvāru . dānapālanayōrmadhyē . dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānātsvargamavā pnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . mahatāmapi pāpānāṁ dṛṣṭō śāstrēṣu niṣkṛtiḥ dēvasva(ṁ)
māhartu niṣkṛtiḥ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 16.103 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
